hooks.command: $inp = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $inp.tool_input.command; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; Add-Content -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\bash-log.txt" -Value "$ts | $cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; exit 0

$inp = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $inp.tool_input.file_path; $root = 'g:\PROJECT\Learning Projects'; if ($f -and !$f.StartsWith($root)) { Write-Output "BLOCKED: Writes outside Learning Projects are not allowed. Path: $f"; exit 1 }; exit 0
Write-Output 'SDLC reminder: Before this session ends, append one line to Section 18 (Session Log) in the active SDLC_VALIDATION.md — date, work done, gate changes, and next step.'; exit 0

$inp = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $inp.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match '\.py$') { if (Get-Command ruff -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { & ruff check --fix $f } else { Write-Output 'ruff not installed - skipping Python lint' } }; exit 0

$inp = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $inp.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match '\.sql$') { if (Get-Command sqlfluff -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { & sqlfluff fix --dialect ansi $f } else { Write-Output 'sqlfluff not installed - skipping SQL lint' } }; exit 0
